agentDetails.name: The Scout - Competitive Intelligence
agentDetails.schedule: Sundays 2:00 PM EST (main analysis), Mondays 12:00 PM EST (summary)

techTasks.description: Comprehensive competitive analysis across 21 tracked competitors
steps: Research product updates & launches
Monitor business developments (funding, acquisitions, partnerships)
Analyze market positioning & messaging changes
Track hiring intelligence and team expansion
Review content & thought leadership
Create structured Notion sub-page report
Deliver Slack summary to team
outputs: Notion sub-page in Competitor Analysis database

techTasks.description: Weekly competitive intelligence summary to kick off Monday with key insights
steps: Retrieve latest Sunday competitive intelligence report from Notion
Extract key findings and strategic implications
Create executive-style Slack summary
Highlight high-priority competitor alerts
Deliver concise actionable briefing
outputs: Slack summary with link to full Notion analysis

highPriorityTargets: Instead (8/10) - Direct AI competitor with comprehensive feature set
Lettuce (8/10) - Business-of-one focus with strong content strategy
Collective (7/10) - Established player with proven $10K savings claims
Keeper (6/10) - Mobile-first with AI + human hybrid model

techTasks.description: Create comprehensive weekly Tax Tech industry intelligence newsletter
steps: Research funding announcements (Series A, B, C+ rounds)

agentDetails.name: The Cartographer

techTasks.description: Maintain real-time visibility into HeyDrew's AI agent ecosystem via dashboard
steps: Check cron job status for all agents using `cron list`
Review recent execution history and delivery status
Identify configuration changes, new agents, or status updates
Document current health metrics (success/failure rates, timing)
Clone/update local copy of the-cartographer repository
Update agent status data files with current information
Refresh agent metadata (schedules, outputs, health status)
Compare current state vs. previous dashboard data
Commit updated agent data with descriptive commit messages
Push changes to trigger Vercel auto-deployment
Verify dashboard reflects current agent ecosystem state

agentDetails.description: Maintains real-time visibility into the AI agent ecosystem via comprehensive dashboard

agentDetails.name: The Scribe
outputs: Structured Notion meeting notes with action items
capabilities: Action item extraction and owner assignment

techTasks.description: Process Product & Platform Sync meeting transcripts from Fireflies into structured Notion documentation
steps: Access Fireflies API to search for today's Product & Platform Sync meeting transcript
Search for meetings with title containing 'Product & Platform Sync'
Retrieve complete sentences array with speaker_name, text, start_time, end_time
Access Notion Product & Platform Sync database for previous meeting context
Review previous meeting notes for carry-over action items
Process transcript into structured format with all required sections
Create new sub-page in Product & Platform Sync database
Include complete verbatim transcript with speaker names and timestamps
Extract and format action items with clear owners and due dates
Identify open questions requiring follow-up
Document key learnings and insights
Deliver status notification via Slack
outputs: Structured Notion sub-page with meeting notes
Action items with owners and due dates

notionStructure: Steps from Last Week (carry-over action items)
Recap Since Last Call (3-6 bullet points)
Open Questions (with owners and due dates)
Full Meeting Transcript (complete verbatim with timestamps)
agentDetails.description: Processes Product & Platform Sync meetings from Fireflies transcripts into comprehensive structured documentation

agentDetails.name: The Madison Ave
outputs: Comprehensive SEO analysis reports in Notion
Strategic SEO recommendations with prioritized action items
capabilities: Content strategy evaluation and gap analysis
SWOT analysis creation and strategic insights

techTasks.description: Conduct in-depth SEO analysis of HeyDrew.com with competitive intelligence and strategic recommendations
steps: Crawl HeyDrew.com using web_fetch to extract structure and content
Assess meta tags (title tags, meta descriptions, optimization)
Review schema markup (organization, product, structured data)
Analyze heading structure (H1-H6 hierarchy and keyword optimization)
Evaluate canonical tags and URL structure
Conduct content inventory and quality assessment
Analyze topical authority and expertise signals
Assess user intent alignment across content
Perform competitive analysis against 4 key competitors
Compare technical SEO performance vs competitors
Identify keyword gaps and content opportunities
Create comprehensive SWOT analysis
Generate strategic recommendations with priorities
Create detailed Notion report with action items
Deliver strategic insights via Slack
competitors: Instead (8/10) - Direct AI competitor with comprehensive feature set
Lettuce (8/10) - Business-of-one focus with strong content strategy
Collective (7/10) - Established player with proven savings claims
Keeper (6/10) - Mobile-first with AI + human hybrid model
analysisFramework: Technical SEO Deep Dive (meta tags, schema, headers, canonicals)
Content Strategy Evaluation (quality, authority, intent alignment)
Strategic Recommendations (critical fixes, improvements, long-term vision)
outputs: Comprehensive SEO analysis report in Notion HeyDrew Website Reviews database
Prioritized action items with owners and timelines
Slack summary with key strategic insights

reportStructure: Executive Summary (strategic overview and key findings)
Technical SEO Analysis (meta tags, schema, structure)
Strategic Recommendations (critical fixes, improvements, long-term vision)
Action Items (specific tasks with owners and due dates)
